summary: Executed backend + frontend validation for SSR chatbot admin module on public preview URL. Core APIs and admin UI flows passed, with one intermittent backend serialization failure observed in logs during feedback creation path.

critical.issue: Intermittent 500 observed in backend logs with ValueError from FastAPI jsonable_encoder: ObjectId not serializable.

minor.issue: One transient connection abort (RemoteDisconnected) occurred once during high-sequence test; passed on immediate retry.

action_items: Investigate /api/admin/chatbot/feedback intermittent ObjectId serialization path; ensure every response payload excludes/transforms Mongo ObjectId before returning JSON.
Add lightweight retry/error-hardening for /api/chat/session reads to reduce transient connection abort impact.
Re-run regression on chatbot feedback + conversation detail sequence after ObjectId fix.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py exceeds 1000 lines; split chatbot admin, public chat, AI generation, and proxy routes into dedicated modules for maintainability and safer debugging.
Intermittent ObjectId serialization indicates at least one response path may still leak raw Mongo types despite projections; add defensive serializer or strict response models.
Admin chatbot module has strong data-testid coverage and coherent SSR shell integration; maintain this pattern for future admin modules.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for requested admin chatbot UI interactions

seed_data_creation: Created transient TEST_* chat sessions and feedback records through public/admin APIs during test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated endpoints: GET/PUT /api/admin/chatbot/settings, GET /api/admin/chatbot/conversations, GET /api/admin/chatbot/conversation/{sessionId}, POST /api/admin/chatbot/conversation/{sessionId}/generate-reply, POST/GET/DELETE feedback APIs, POST synthesize + GET/DELETE improvements APIs, POST /api/chat/message, GET /api/chat/session/{sessionId}. UI validated for /admin/chatbot tabs + conversation select + generate reply from selected user message. Keep focus on intermittent ObjectId serialization seen in backend logs for feedback path.
rca of the issue: Reproduction signal: during one test sequence creating feedback after selecting conversation, backend returned 500 and logs showed FastAPI ValueError from jsonable_encoder with ObjectId type. Subsequent retries passed, indicating a non-deterministic serialization path. Likely root cause is a response object occasionally containing raw Mongo ObjectId from a document path not fully projected/sanitized. Mitigation: enforce explicit response DTOs or a serializer wrapper to convert/exclude ObjectId in all chatbot admin endpoints (feedback + detail aggregation paths).
